name: Cream Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients.
2. Cut in 1/4 cup of butter until well combined.
3. Add the cream, mixing until a soft dough forms.
4. Roll out on a floured board.
5. Cut with a 2-inch cutter.
6. Bake on an ungreased pan in a hot oven at 400°F for 12 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
